description: Debug hand is a component that is used to show a debug visual when the Biped Rig Component has its "Debug Hand" sync delegate pressed.

fields._objects: The slots of the mesh renderers that are being used to debug the hand.
fields._materialTarget: The component used as a reference to apply ``_material`` to the debug when ``_material`` changes.
fields._material: The material this component is using to render the visual
